case_title: WOOYEON CHO et al VS. PATRICK DOHERTY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $5.00) SERVED APR-16-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOHERTY, FRANCIS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSEN. FILED BY CHO, WOOYEON KING, DEVONE XAVIER DOHERTY, FRANCIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHO, WOOYEON KING, DEVONE XAVIER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOHERTY, PATRICK DOHERTY, FRANCIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

RETURNED MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT/NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF EXHIBITS RETURNED AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT DOCUMENTS MAILED TO DEVONE KING RETURNED. ENVELOPE STAMPED" RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,425.00 FILED BY CHO, WOOYEON KING, DEVONE XAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT DOHERTY, PATRICK DOHERTY, FRANCIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2014 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $5.00) SERVED APR-15-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOHERTY, PATRICK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT PATRICK DOHERTY WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCIS DOHERTY WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
